ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the Twitter user who posted the tweet */,
  "permalink" TEXT /* Permalink to the tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the tweet */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was posted */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites */,
  "mentions" TEXT /* Mentions in the tweet */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags in the tweet */,
  "geo" TEXT /* Geolocation of the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was last updated */,
  "tweet_type" TEXT /* Type of tweet (e.g. original, retweet, reply) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g. Twitter Web Client, Twitter for iPhone) */,
  "in_reply_to_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that this tweet is in reply to */,
  "in_reply_to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user that this tweet is in reply to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_username FOREIGN KEY ("username") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the Twitter user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the Twitter user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the Twitter user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the Twitter user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "friends_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends the user has */,
  "listed_count" INTEGER /* Number of lists the user is a member of */,
  "favourites_count" INTEGER /* Number of tweets the user has favourited */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user is verified or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that contains the mention */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the mentioned user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mention was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mention was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that contains the hashtag */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* Hashtag text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hashtag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hashtag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that the engagement metric belongs to */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement was last updated */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g. retweet, favourite, reply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagements_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that the sentiment analysis result belongs to */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the tweet (e.g. positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment analysis was last updated */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet (e.g. a numerical value between -1 and 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic modeling result */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that the topic modeling result belongs to */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the tweet (e.g. politics, sports, entertainment) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic modeling result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic modeling result was last updated */,
  "topic_score" REAL /* Score of the topic modeling result (e.g. a numerical value between 0 and 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that the report belongs to */,
  "report" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g. tweet analysis, user analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet that the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization" TEXT /* Visualization data (e.g. chart, graph, heat map) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g. chart, graph, heat map) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_tweets" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets_mentions" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mention */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "mention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets_hashtags" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "hashtag_id")
)
